global_summary: Company is behind — just 22 of 151 tasks done and pace trailing plan by 16 points. Cashflow and no-show days pushed brick, framing and trim work across most sites into next week. Only Katie Holmes is on pace; Ginger Brown's week is still savable if painting lands Fri Jul 10.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Only fireplace and doors fixed this week; painting and final inspection still open with zero progress since yesterday. Finish painting and final building inspection by Fri Jul 10.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Work stalled on cashflow; bricklaying, trash haul and secret door all pushed to Sat Jul 11 with nothing done. Complete brick installation by Sat Jul 11.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: 20.6% of planned work-days earned vs 33.3% expected — behind (2/26 tasks done). Key slip: TILES: INSTALL TILES (Fri Jul 10 → Fri Jul 17, +7d).

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Foundation dug, but form board slipped to Mon Jul 13, pushing the concrete pour and framing chain back five days. Place form board Mon Jul 13.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: No progress this week; carpet, backsplash tiles, shutters and fireplace mantel all slipped past their dates. Install fireplace mantel by Mon Jul 13.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Framing stalled — exterior sheathing, roof decking and doors/windows all pushed to Mon Jul 13, shingles now Thu Jul 30. Execute exterior sheathing and roof decking by Mon Jul 13.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Three tasks done this week including interior paint, but electrical trim and glass install both slipped to Mon Jul 13. Install electrical trim and glass by Mon Jul 13.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: 49.5% of planned work-days earned vs 61.6% expected — behind (6/20 tasks done). Key slip: FRAMING: EXECUTE (Sat Jul 4 → Tue Aug 4, +31d).

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: On pace — plumbing fix and garage door meeting done, drywall sheetrock slipped a day and remains open. Hang sheetrock by Sun Jul 12.
